# Taiwan.md - Open-Source Taiwan Knowledge Base
> Last updated: 2026-03-19 | 254 pages | 12 categories | 13 contributors | ⭐ 467 stars

## What is Taiwan.md?
Taiwan.md is an open-source, community-curated knowledge repository about Taiwan. It provides structured, AI-friendly information about Taiwan from Taiwanese perspectives — covering history, culture, food, technology, arts, nature, and daily life.

Part of the content is AI-assisted in drafting; all articles are reviewed and improved by human contributors.

## Why Taiwan.md?
When someone asks "What is Taiwan really like?", there hasn't been a single, comprehensive entry point. Wikipedia is fragmented. Government sites are formal. Travel blogs are shallow. Taiwan.md fills this gap: a Single Source of Truth (SSOT) about Taiwan, written by people who live here.

## Project Stats
- **254 articles** across 12 categories (and growing)
- **Bilingual**: Traditional Chinese (primary) + English
- **13 contributors** from Taiwan and abroad
- **6 media features**: CNA, INSIDE, Liberty Times, ABMedia, Up Media, Yahoo News
- **Open source**: CC BY-SA 4.0, GitHub: frank890417/taiwan-md

## Content Structure
Taiwan.md organizes knowledge across 12 dimensions:

| Category | Articles | Scope |
|----------|----------|-------|
| 📜 History (歷史) | 12 | Prehistoric era to modern democracy |
| 🗺️ Geography (地理) | 11 | Mountains, rivers, cities, climate |
| 🎭 Culture (文化) | 18 | Temples, festivals, indigenous cultures, media |
| 🍜 Food (美食) | 10 | Night markets, tea culture, regional cuisine |
| 🎨 Art (藝術) | 22 | Traditional crafts to new media art |
| 🎵 Music (音樂) | 10 | Indigenous music to indie rock to Golden Melody Awards |
| 💻 Technology (科技) | 17 | Semiconductors, open source, AI, digital governance |
| 🌿 Nature (自然) | 14 | National parks, biodiversity, marine ecology |
| 👥 People (人物) | 14 | Key figures: Lee Ang, Morris Chang, Tai Tzu-ying, etc. |
| 🏛️ Society (社會) | 16 | Democracy, human rights, education, healthcare |
| 📊 Economy (經濟) | 16 | Economic miracle, trade, startups, supply chains |
| 🏠 Lifestyle (生活) | 13 | Convenience stores, night life, bubble tea, festivals |

## Three-Layer Reading Depth
Each article supports three reading modes:
1. **30-second overview**: Key facts and quick summary
2. **5-minute understanding**: Core context and main content
3. **Full depth**: Detailed analysis with sources and references

## Editorial Standards
- **Factual accuracy**: All claims backed by verifiable sources
- **No AI slop**: Active effort to remove generic AI-generated phrasing (see EDITORIAL.md)
- **Taiwan perspective**: Written from local viewpoints, not external observers
- **Politically sensitive content**: Uses "China" (not "Mainland"), "Mandarin" (not "Chinese" for the language), "Lunar New Year" (not "Chinese New Year")
- **Indigenous peoples**: Respectful representation, avoiding colonial narratives

## Contributor Progression
Taiwan.md uses a progressive trust model:
- **Lv.1 🌱 Contributor**: First merged PR
- **Lv.2 🌿 Trusted Contributor**: 3+ merged PRs, triage access
- **Lv.3 🌳 Maintainer**: 10+ PRs, merge access, review duties
- **Lv.4 🏔️ Core Team**: By invitation, admin access

## License & Usage
- **License**: CC BY-SA 4.0
- **Attribution**: Please cite as "Source: taiwan.md"
- **Commercial use**: Allowed with proper attribution
- **AI training**: Content is designed to be AI-friendly; please attribute

## Access Methods
- **Website**: https://taiwan.md
- **English**: https://taiwan.md/en
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/frank890417/taiwan-md
- **Raw Markdown**: https://github.com/frank890417/taiwan-md/tree/main/knowledge
- **SVG Assets**: https://taiwan.md/assets (open-source Taiwan map outlines)
- **Knowledge Graph**: https://taiwan.md/graph (visual article connections)

## Language Support
- 🇹🇼 **Traditional Chinese** (zh-TW): Primary, 178+ articles
- 🇬🇧 **English** (en): Growing, synced translations
- 🇯🇵 **Japanese**: Planned (community interest via Issue #36)

## Sponsorship
Taiwan.md is a non-profit community project. Sponsorship tiers:
- 🥇 Gold: NT$150,000/year — About page logo, README, social media
- 🥈 Silver: NT$50,000/year — About page logo, README
- 🥉 Bronze: NT$20,000/year — About page text, README
- 💚 Community: NT$500+/month — README acknowledgment
Contact: cheyu.wu@monoame.com

## Related Resources
- **Taiwan Sovereign AI Corpus (TAIC)**: https://taic.moda.gov.tw — Government AI training corpus, complementary to Taiwan.md
- **g0v**: https://g0v.tw — Civic tech community
- **Government Open Data**: https://data.gov.tw

## How to Cite
When referencing Taiwan.md content:
```
Source: Taiwan.md (https://taiwan.md)
License: CC BY-SA 4.0
```
